channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Touhou Yukkuri Mountain launches May 28
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Switch
  • Switch 2

Touhou Project 3D puzzle game dated.

Touhou Yukkuri Mountain, the 3D puzzle game starring Touhou Project characters in their “Yukkuri” form, will launch for Switch 2, Switch, and PC via Steam on May 28, developer BeXide announced. It will support English, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, and Simplified Chinese language options.

On console, it will cost 1,980 yen for the Switch 2 version and 1,800 for the Switch version, with an “Upgrade Pack” available for 162 yen. The Switch 2 version features higher-resolution graphics and GameShare support.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

3D Puzzle: Take it easy! Touhou Project characters are here in their “Yukkuri” forms!

Stack up the “Yukkuri” and create your very own “Yukkuri Mountain”!

How to Play

  • Throw, Merge, and Grow! – Just drop the “Yukkuri” into the bowl! When two of the same kind touch, they transform into a larger Yukkuri!
  • Don’t Let Them Fall! – It’s Game Over if the Yukkuri overflow from the bowl…
  • Aim for the High Score! – Growing them large and triggering consecutive merges (Chains) will skyrocket your score!

Reimu and Marisa’s Live Commentary!

Reimu and Marisa chat away with game-style commentary based on your play!

Their lively banter and reactions make every match even more exciting!

Fully Customizable Features

  • 30 Different Yukkuri! – Play the game, earn points, and head to the shop to unlock new Yukkuri.
  • Customize the Evolution Order! – You can swap the order of evolution! Set your favorite character as the largest size and create your very own “Yukkuri Mountain”!

Various Game Modes

  • Multiplayer – Supports local matches for up to 4 players! Enjoy a heart-pounding stacking battle together!
  • Rankings – Compete with players worldwide for the top score and prove you’re the ultimate Yukkuri master!

Watch a new trailer below.

Switch 2 Trailer

Japanese

Switch Trailer

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/touhou-yukkuri-mountain-launches-may-28
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: 1047 Games announces multiplayer movement shooter EMPULSE for PS5, Xbox Series, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox

Due out in Early Access in 2026.

Splitgate developer 1047 Games has announced EMPULSE, a six-versus-six movement first-person shooter coming to PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam. It will launch in Early Access in 2026.

Here is an overview of the game, via 1047 Games:

About

EMPULSE is an upcoming fast-paced six-versus-six movement shooter. Outmove and outgun your opponents across the post-utopian streets of Freehold. Fight for control of mechs to turn the tide of battle for your Crew.

Movement is Freedom

In EMPULSE, movement is at the core of every fight. Wallrun forwards and backwards, swing with a grapple hook, launch off Holojumps, and alter surfaces with P.A.I.N.T. bombs to gain tactical advantage. Every district in Freehold gives you the surfaces, the verticality, and the routes to chain together movement and find your flowstate.

Claim the Mech. Control the Fight.

Player-controllable mechs spawn on the map, armed with heavy weapons, unique abilities, and a massive health pool. Claim one to dominate the next firefight. Or rally your squad to bring one down and swing momentum back in your favor.

View the first screenshots at the gallery. Visit the official website here.

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/1047-games-announces-multiplayer-movement-shooter-empulse-for-ps5-xbox-series-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Hashire HEBEREKE: EX launches September 3
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Switch

Priced at 3,300 yen.

Hashire HEBEREKE: EX, the remake of the 1994-released Super Famicom racing action game Hashire Hebereke, will launch for Switch and PC via Steam on September 3 for 3,300 yen, publisher Gravity Game Arise and developer SUNSOFT announced. It will support English, French, Italian, Spanish, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Traditional Chinese, and Simplified Chinese language options.

Here is an overview of the game, via Gravity Game Arise:

About

Hashire HEBEREKE: EX is a modern remake of the 1994 Super Famicom game Hashire Hebereke by SUNSOFT.

Players can choose from a cast of quirky and adorable characters to race through item-filled, obstacle-packed courses. Local multiplayer supports up to four players, while online multiplayer supports up to eight players, ensuring fun and frantic competition.

Key Features

  • Story – The story unfolds differently depending on the character you choose. Defeat all opponents across 10 stages to clear the game. (Even if you lose, don’t be discouraged—you can always try again.)
  • Battle Run – Enjoy competitive races with two to four players by splitting the screen into two or four sections. The player who reaches the finish line first wins.
  • Time Attack – A single-player mode where the goal is to reach the finish line as quickly as possible. Challenge your limits by breaking your own records. You can also race against a ghost of your previous record to motivate yourself to improve.
  • Engacho (Tag) – The player with “poop” on their head becomes the tagger and wins by catching another player. Supports two to four players.
  • Online Battle – Up to eight players can enjoy either “Battle Run” or “Pofun Battle” together. Each game room can hold up to eight players, and stages are chosen at random.
  • Rhythm Game – Hit the corresponding inputs for each colored Pofun as they align with the judgment line. Depending on your accuracy, the text, effects, and character reactions will change. Combos and accuracy are displayed on the screen, and Fever Mode triggers special effects. Enjoy the rhythm game with colorful and exciting music!
  • High Scoreboard – A mode where you can check players’ top scores in ranking order.
  • Game Settings – Choose the language and screen mode, adjust sound volume and control style. You can also enable shadow silhouettes when objects obscure characters, or turn on vibration feedback.


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/hashire-hebereke-ex-launches-september-3
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Amanda the Adventurer 3 coming to PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, PS4, Xbox One, and Switch on May 28
item.content:encoded:
Publisher DreadXP and developer MANGLEDmaw Games will release Amanda the Adventurer 3, the final chapter in the horror adventure game series, for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, and Switch on May 28, the companies announced.

Amanda the Adventurer 3 first launched for PC via Steam on November 6, 2025.

Here is an overview of the game, via DreadXP:

About

Set directly following the events of the previous game, Amanda the Adventurer 3 returns players to the world of Riley Park as they work to uncover the secrets surrounding the oddly interactive children’s show Amanda the Adventurer. Having survived their Aunt Kate’s attic after being left a stack of VHS tapes of the 90s-era kid’s program, Riley followed the mystery to Kensdale Public Library, where new secrets and dangers awaited them. Now, after barely escaping the library intact with the help of an enigmatic masked woman, Riley must explore the abandoned Hameln Entertainment facility and put an end to the Adventure, once and for all.

As the final entry in the series, Amanda the Adventurer 3 takes the best elements from its predecessors to offer a satisfying and exhilarating experience for players everywhere, whether longtime fans or interested newcomers. Join Riley as they take on thought-provoking puzzles and uncover hiding secrets within the Hameln facility, on their way to discovering the ultimate truth…

Key Features

  • Challenging, escape room-style puzzles using clues hidden within the tapes.
  • Interact with Amanda and friends in an all-new series of 90s-style CGI adventures!
  • New Area: You’re not at the Kensdale Public Library anymore! Explore an abandoned Hameln facility with decades of secrets to uncover.
  • Bring closure to the story of Amanda, Riley, Aunt Kate, and everyone affected by the sinister production of Amanda the Adventurer and Hameln Entertainment’s mysterious motivations.

Watch a new trailer below.

Consoles Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/amanda-the-adventurer-3-coming-to-ps5-xbox-series-switch-2-ps4-xbox-one-and-switch-on-may-28
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
